description: Canonical enum definitions for provenance, maturity, confidence, and output effect classification. Governed by model-extension-2-spec-v0.2.1 §12.

values.label: Measured
values.description: Value derived from direct physical measurement under documented conditions.

values.label: Literature Derived
values.description: Value sourced from peer-reviewed or credible published literature with citation.

values.label: Analog Estimated
values.description: Value estimated by analogy to a known related material or geometry with declared basis.

values.label: Placeholder
values.description: Interim value assigned for structural completeness. research_required must be true. Not for use in final output claims.

values.label: Hypothesis Only
values.description: Value based on theoretical conjecture only, no experimental or literature basis. research_required must be true.

values.label: Concept Only
values.description: Concept exists on paper or in theory only. No hardware demonstration.

values.label: Bench Evidence
values.description: Laboratory or bench demonstration exists at small scale under controlled conditions.

values.label: Modeled Only
values.description: Behavior predicted by simulation or analytical model but not yet demonstrated physically.

values.label: Heritage Analog
values.description: Based on a heritage system or analog that operated in a relevant environment.

values.label: Qualified Estimate
values.description: Expert-qualified estimate with documented rationale and known uncertainty bounds.

values.label: Custom
values.description: Operator-defined maturity classification. Must be documented in notes.

values.label: Low
values.description: High uncertainty. Results should be treated as directional only.

values.label: Medium
values.description: Moderate uncertainty. Useful for engineering trade space but not for design commitment.

values.label: High
values.description: Well-bounded uncertainty. Suitable for engineering trade analysis with appropriate margins.

values.label: Unknown
values.description: Confidence not assessable from available information.

values.label: Output Driving
values.description: This field affects exploratory numeric outputs through declared Extension 2 runtime equations.

values.label: Metadata Only
values.description: This field affects warnings, confidence, or guide text only. Does not alter numeric outputs unless a future law promotes it.

values.label: Warning Only
values.description: This field triggers operator warnings or cautions but does not directly alter numeric outputs.
